items.title: Explaining my Notre Dame player rankings for the 2026 CFB season
items.summary: I hope everyone has enjoyed the “Thee Things I Like” series about Notre Dame’s Top 20 players. I wanted to rank the players, but I didn’t want to get too in the weeds with why a guy is here instead of there, so I thought this was a fun way to go about it all. […]

items.title: Notre Dame Football Recruiting: 4-Star QB Trey Tagliaferri decommits from the Irish
items.summary: Well that was about as quick as it gets. 4-Star quarterback Trey Tagliaferri decommitted from Notre Dame and its 2028 football recruiting class just less than a week after giving his public commitment. I’m not going to dive too far into the weeds for this one — it’s the 2028 class and that’s still forever […]

items.title: Is this what Notre Dame’s Shamrock Series uniform will look like against Wisconsin?
items.summary: Notre Dame will open the 2026 college football season on the road on September 6 against the Wisconsin Badgers. The game will be played inside Lambeau Field (home of the Green Bay Packers) as part of Notre Dame’s Shamrock Series. One of the many different things about a Shamrock Series game is the different alternate […]
